title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Allow Once option is selected
scenario: After selecting "Allow Once" on location sharing dialogue, the app should re-prompt for location consent upon restart.
steps: Start app for first time, finish onboarding -> Home Screen with location dialogue showing "Allow Once", "Allow While Using App", "Don't Allow".
Tap "Allow Once", then navigate to App Settings > Find My Device -> FMD screen visible with no location dialogue.
Restart app -> User is prompted for location consent again on Home Screen.
expected: After restarting the app, the user should be prompted for location consent again on the Home Screen.
